rows.label: tev015101_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev015101_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Lara Nara about battle points (BP).

rows.label: tev015101_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev015101_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Lara Nara if he has
any interesting news.

rows.label: tev015101_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Lara Nara about enemy types.

rows.label: tev015101_SEL0051
rows.name:
Ask Lara Nara about materials
obtained from indigen appendages.

rows.label: tev015101_SEL1011
rows.name:
Ask Lara Nara about time
limits on BLADE scouting.

rows.label: tev015101_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Lara Nara about recent developments.

rows.label: tev015101_SEL1031
rows.name:
Ask Lara Nara for tips on
editing your profile.

rows.label: tev015101_SEL2011
rows.name: Ask Lara Nara about the Central Life.

rows.label: tev015101_MSG0001
rows.name:
Oh my! Is the new [ST:gender p1=guy p2=gal ] turning to little ol' me for help?
You're making me blush! Well, you bet I'll teach
you. I'll teach you everything you want to know![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG0002
rows.name:
You earn battle points as your
base level and class rank rise.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG0003
rows.name:
You can spend those points to upgrade
your skills and Arts any time you like.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG0004
rows.name:
You can either upgrade your Arts to learn devastating
techniques, or upgrade your skills to heighten
your overall power. It's TOTALLY up to you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG0005
rows.name:
I wonder what sort of BLADE you're going
to become? Mmm... Such possibilities...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG0010
rows.name:
I heard there was a stalled Doll
in the residential district, so
I went to see for myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG0011
rows.name:
And would you believe it? A real
looker of a BLADE was standing right
beside it. He was just my type![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG0012
rows.name:
So I wonder if I could get Vandham
to "coincidentally" assign us both
to the same mission. Heh heh heh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG0022
rows.name:
By now, I'm sure you've noticed
that different enemies have different
ways of locating their prey.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG0023
rows.name:
Like, some attack whoever they can see, while
others respond when they hear you approach.
Is this ringing any bells? Yes? Maybe?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG0024
rows.name:
Anyway, you'll need to deal with each one differently.
Like, when facing the visual type, you want to consider
its field of vision and avoid crossing it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG0025
rows.name:
And when facing the keen-eared type, it's
not a great idea to wander too close.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG0026
rows.name:
Of course you can always retreat from your foe,
but it's better to avoid difficult situations
entirely by simply thinking before you act.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG0030
rows.name:
Defeating indigens and enemy
machinery is a good way to
salvage all sorts of materials.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG0031
rows.name:
But some rare materials can only
be acquired when you destroy a
specific appendage of your enemy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG0032
rows.name:
For example, when you destroy
the head of a petramand, it might
drop its shell. Neat, huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG0033
rows.name:
And if you destroy its pincers, it may
drop one of its precious patterned claws.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG0034
rows.name:
Such rare materials can be sold for lots of money,
or even used to make powerful weapons. So you
should destroy as many appendages as you can![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG1024
rows.name:
Earlier, in the BLADE Scout Console, I found a BLADE
operative who looked as strong as he was handsome.
And believe you me, I spent a fortune to sign him![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG1025
rows.name:
But then, like an idiot, I just stood there talking
instead of taking him on a mission, and he left as
soon as the contract expired. Can you believe that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG1026
rows.name:
Seriously, we were having a very pleasant
conversation. I don't think that kind of thing
should count against a contract's duration.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG1027
rows.name:
Oh dear. Just talking about this is
deepening the wrinkles on Yusof's
brow. What a thoughtless BLADE I am![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG1031
rows.name:
I know that Erio of the Definias
has to be somewhere in this city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG1032
rows.name:
But I don't think she intends to
harm any humans. I'm sure you can
attest to that better than anyone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG1033
rows.name:
And if she does cause any problems,
the Companion-in- love tag team of
Yusof and I will put a stop to that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG1034
rows.name:
That's what we Companion are for,
after all. Just leave the city to us![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG1041
rows.name:
Ever since I typed up my profile,
I've had BLADEs reaching out to
me from all over the place.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG1042
rows.name:
If you want my advice, you'd do well to
fill out a proper profile for yourself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG1043
rows.name:
It stands to reason you'd want to know a bit about
someone before you consider hiring them, right? All
the more so if you're putting your life in their hands![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG1044
rows.name:
If you hope to be the sort of person
that lots of other BLADEs turn to,
you need to sell yourself a little.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG1045
rows.name:
Let's see, now... What sort
of juicy tidbits should I
amaze the public with next?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG2035
rows.name:
The team of Testament that went out to repair the
Central Life were taken straight to the maintenance
center when they came back to the city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG2036
rows.name:
Their faces looked so pale! ...Well, I guess
Blue Blood faces don't really turn pale,
but that was the vibe I got from them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG2037
rows.name:
What could have been inside the
Central Life that made them so upset?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG2038
rows.name:
When they do reclaim and repair it, we'll
be able to return to our old bodies,
right? So when's that going to happen?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG2039
rows.name:
I hate to give up the chance to be together
forever with Yusof in our Blue Bloods,
but... Well, we do miss our old bodies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG2042
rows.name:
I know that Erio of the Definias
has to be somewhere in this city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG2043
rows.name:
But I don't think she intends to
harm any humans. I'm sure you can
attest to that better than anyone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG2044
rows.name:
And if she does cause any problems,
the Companion-in- love tag team of
Yusof and I will put a stop to that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_MSG2045
rows.name:
That's what we Companion are for,
after all. Just leave the city to us![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015103_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask what Lara Nara intends to do next.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015103_MSG0001
rows.name:
What about you, [ST:playername ]? Do you want
to return to your old body?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015103_JNK1030
rows.name: Affirm[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015103_SEL1031
rows.name:
Say that you do wish to return
to your flesh-and-blood body.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015103_JNK1040
rows.name: Deny[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015101_SEL1041
rows.name:
Say that you'd prefer to
stay in your Blue Blood.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015103_MSG0002
rows.name: I feel the same way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015103_MSG0003
rows.name:
As the last survivors of humanity, we
have a duty to flourish here on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015103_MSG0004
rows.name:
Who knows? A few years from
now, you could be a parent![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015103_MSG0005
rows.name:
And if you need a babysitter, give
me a ring. Kids just love me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015103_MSG0006
rows.name: You're quite the realist, aren't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015103_MSG0007
rows.name:
We may have fought off the Growth, but
we still have indigens coming after us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015103_MSG0008
rows.name:
If we were all back in our real bodies, I suppose we'd
switch to fighting primarily in Dolls. But it would
still take a while before we could stabilize the area.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015103_MSG0009
rows.name:
And to accomplish that, we'd
need the flexibility of ground
troops in Blue Bloods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015103_MSG0010
rows.name:
Maybe that's a duty we should entrust to people like
you who prefer to stay in Blue Bloods. They can be
brave knights who ensure the prosperity of humankind![ST:wait ]
